---
title: "food insecurity"
author: "Quinn"
date: "2026-06-05"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r}
source("/Users/natalieli/Desktop/ECON484 Project/FoodInsecurity_Unemployment (1).R")
```

## Main Results

```{r}
dml_result <- data.frame(
  Model = "Double ML",
  ATE = round(irm$coef, 4),
  SE = round(irm$se, 4),
  p_value = round(irm$pval, 4)
)

knitr::kable(dml_result, caption = "ATE of 2021 SNAP receipt on 2023 unemployment")
```

## Descriptive Statistics

```{r}
desc <- data.frame(
  N = nrow(d),
  Unemployment_Rate = mean(d$unemployed),
  SNAP_2021_Rate = mean(d$foodstamp_2021),
  Mean_Education_Years = mean(d$educ_yrs_2021),
  Mean_Age = mean(d$age_2021)
)

knitr::kable(desc, digits = 3)
```

## Graphs

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(d, aes(x = factor(foodstamp_2021), y = unemployed)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "bar") +
  labs(
    title = "2023 Unemployment Rate by 2021 SNAP Receipt",
    x = "Family received SNAP in 2021",
    y = "Unemployment rate in 2023"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
ggplot(d, aes(x = educ_yrs_2021, y = unemployed)) +
  geom_jitter(height = 0.03, alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  labs(
    title = "Education and 2023 Unemployment",
    x = "Years of education in 2021",
    y = "Unemployed in 2023"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
```
